name: orbital-atlas
description: Interactive 3D viewer of Earth's orbital environment — live-propagated satellites, stations, and debris on a dark night-Earth globe. Rotate 360°, zoom, click any object for details, filter layers, and trace orbit paths.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && touch dist/.nojekyll && cd dist && git init -q -b gh-pages && git add -A && git commit -qm deploy && git push -fq https://github.com/fourn9/orbital-atlas.git gh-pages && rm -rf .git
